verdicts.reasoning: The homepage URL for Magento returned a fetch error, so the description cannot be confirmed.

The evidence states that traditional admin and integration token generation methods (OAuth 1.0a) are still supported in non-SaaS environments, contradicting the claim that only OAuth2 and token methods are available.
The evidence confirms that developers can create integrations and obtain tokens without human approval in self-hosted instances.
The evidence confirms that the API surface includes REST and GraphQL APIs, indicating broad coverage.
The evidence supports that developers can build integrations today, confirming the buildability claim.
